message:
fix(frankensqlite): 3 bugs found in fresh-eyes review

1. gonogo_tests: hash prefix said "sha256:" but used FNV-1a → fixed to "fnv1a:"
2. evidence_tests: empty advisory-tier (T6) artifacts incorrectly counted
   as blocking gaps — now only empty blocking-tier artifacts block the gate
3. rfc_verification_tests: seek_to_offset past end could panic via underflow
   in remaining_estimate() — added bounds clamping and saturating_sub

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
